description: Event trace showing LLM continues processing after user says 'never mind'
issue: User says 'never mind' but LLM continues processing old query and responds to it
symptom: LLM processes 'okay now search About me' instead of stopping for 'never mind'
root_cause: Turn committed before VAD end_of_speech, so 'never mind' became separate turn

event_sequence.description: Turn committed: 'okay now search About me' - User still speaking!
LLM starts thinking - processing 'okay now search About me'
User said 'never mind' - but this is a NEW turn, not an interrupt!

analysis.problem_1: Turn committed at 16:55:36 before VAD end_of_speech
analysis.problem_2: LLM started processing at 16:55:38 while user still speaking
analysis.problem_3: 'Never mind' arrived at 16:55:47 as separate turn - too late to interrupt
analysis.consequence: LLM responded to 'okay now search About me' instead of stopping
